case_title: JOHNNY CHIU VS. YU MING CHAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIU, JOHNNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, YU MING $700.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $700.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHIU, JOHNNY AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, YU MING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2013 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $60.00) SERVED NOV-07-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, YU MING
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR REVIEW. FILED BY DEFENDANT CHAN, YU MING
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED.
